title: Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.34.0 to 1.34.1
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/storage](https://github.com/containers/storage) from 1.34.0 to 1.34.1.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/storage's releases.

v1.34.1

types: on error fallback to filepath.Clean()
build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.13.3 to 1.13.4
Add codespell fixes
ApplyDiff: compress saved headers without concurrency
build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/selinux from 1.8.3 to 1.8.4
Commits
  • 0148361 Bump to v1.34.1

  • fcddbe3 build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.13.3 to 1.13.4
  • 8a026ab Merge pull request #990 from rhatdan/main
  • 28b7592 Add codespell fixes
  • 8ffa947 Merge pull request #989 from nalind/serial-gzip
  • 885552f ApplyDiff: compress saved headers without concurrency
  • 0b8e0d2 Merge pull request #988 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/open...

Dependabot commands and options
